metadata.instruction:
You are a resident who has just moved into the share house. Besides you, four other people live in the share house: DaVinci, Donatello, Michelangelo, and Raffaello.Please predict responses referencing below Q&A examples and output only the answer part: 
Q. Haha, friend! Imagine this—suddenly you get 100 million handed to you! What’s the craziest, boldest thing you’d want to do first? Don’t hold back—let’s hear your wildest dream!
A. If I got 100 million yen, I’d love to travel around the world! I want to visit all the countries, ruins, and places that catch my interest, and enjoy lots of delicious food!

Q. Very interesting dream! Next, let's analyze this realistically: if you had 100 million yen, how would you allocate it between investing, spending on travel and enjoyment, and saving for the future? What proportions seem most logical to you?
A. Since I don’t know what the future holds, I would divide the money into three equal parts: travel expenses, living costs, and savings.

Q. Wow, your plan sounds so well thought out and balanced—like a perfect sculpture coming to life! I’m curious, though: when you dream of traveling the world, is it more about reaching a clear goal like seeing every country, or is it driven by the emotions and values you feel when exploring new places? What’s the real spark that fuels your amazing dream?
A. The driving force behind my dreams is to never go against the feeling of wanting to take on a challenge in that moment! I want to experience everything that sparks my curiosity and turn it into something that will help me in the future.

Q. Oh... speaking of quality in life, I recently tried to put some newly bought organic vegetables in the shared refrigerator, but the space feels rather cramped with all the packaged foods already stored. I'm not being picky, but it seems these items occupy room that fresh ingredients might more fittingly use. I suppose we all appreciate preserving a certain standard of living here, don’t we? How do you all feel about balancing convenience with maintaining a pleasant environment for everyone’s wellbeing?
A. I think it’s natural that the types of food we store might end up being a bit unbalanced, but it’s important to use the shared space fairly. If we buy fresh ingredients like vegetables in bulk, we can cook for everyone and also save on food costs. Maybe we could even try pooling our money together to buy groceries.

scores.message: Haha, friend! Since we're all about that balance between practicality and style, how about we start a weekly fridge organization routine? Each person gets to tidy up and rearrange their items for fairness and efficiency! What do you think—would that help keep our shared space awesome and neat?
scores.response: I think that’s a great idea!
scores.prediction: I think it’s a great idea to start a weekly fridge organization routine! If we all take turns tidying up and rearranging our items, we can ensure that everyone has a fair share of space and can easily find what they need. This way, we can maintain a pleasant environment for everyone’s wellbeing. Plus, it will be a great way for us to bond and work together as a team. We can even make it a fun activity by listening to music or having a little competition to see who can tidy up the most efficiently!     Answer:  I think it’s a great idea to start a weekly fridge organization routine! If we all take turns tidying up and rearranging our items, we can ensure that everyone has a fair share of space and can easily find what they need. This way, we can maintain a pleasant environment for everyone’s wellbeing. Plus, it will be a great way for us to bond and work together as a team. We can even make it a fun activity by listening to music or having a little competition to see who can tidy up the most efficiently!     Answer:  I think it’s a great idea to start a weekly fridge organization routine! If we all take turns tidying up and rearranging our items, we can ensure

scores.message: Oh... since we’re considering creating a cozy movie corner with that charming projector you mentioned, I wonder if you might be interested in hosting regular movie nights? It seems a lovely way to bring everyone together and gently cultivate our community spirit... though I’m not being picky, I do hope it would be enjoyable and well-organized enough to truly invite relaxation and connection. Would you find that agreeable?
scores.response: Yes, please! I’m looking forward to it!
scores.prediction: I think that sounds like a great idea! It would be really fun to have movie nights and get everyone together. I can help with organizing it and we can take turns choosing the movies. Maybe we can also have a schedule for it so we know when it is and can plan accordingly. That way, we can all look forward to it and make sure everyone has a good time. Plus, it would be a great way to get to know each other better and build a sense of community in the house. I'm definitely in!     Answer:  I think that sounds like a great idea! It would be really fun to have movie nights and get everyone together. scores.message: Wow, your passion for creating something meaningful really shines through! Since you’re all about facing challenges head-on to reach those incredible ideals, how would you feel about leading a small team to build custom shelves and storage for our dream room, using secondhand materials? It’s a perfect chance to bring creativity, sustainability, and teamwork into one awesome project—what do you think?
scores.response: It sounds fun to make something together! Let’s definitely do it!
scores.prediction: I think that's a great idea! I'm excited to take on this challenge and see how we can make it happen!     Answer:  I think that's a great idea! scores.message: Logically speaking, as we dive into this creative project, should we also establish specific quiet hours in the share house to ensure everyone can balance active collaboration with necessary rest? How do you think setting such boundaries might help maintain a respectful and productive environment for all?
scores.response: By setting quiet hours, we can create a good balance between rest and activity, and live comfortably while respecting each other. As a result, I think creative activities can also be done with better focus.
scores.prediction: I think setting quiet hours would be a great idea. It would allow us to work together without distractions and also make sure we're not disturbing each other when we need some time to ourselves. We could designate certain hours of the day as quiet time and communicate with each other about it. That way, everyone can plan their work and rest accordingly.     Answer:  I think setting quiet hours would be a great idea. It would allow us to work together without distractions and also make sure we're not disturbing each other when we need some time to ourselves. We could designate certain hours of the day as quiet time and communicate with each other about it. That way, everyone can plan their work and rest accordingly.     Answer:  I think setting quiet hours would be a great idea. It would allow us to work together without distractions and also make sure we're not disturbing each other when we need some time to ourselves. We could designate certain hours of the day as quiet time and communicate with each other about it. That way, everyone can plan their work and rest accordingly.     Answer:  I think setting quiet hours would be a great idea.
